locked_params_source: PRE-REG §4 (verbatim, unchanged): fs=48000, block=256, N_blocks=10000, K_PREPARE_START=100, K_XFADE_START=4000, W_XFADE=64, K_SWAP=4064, P_MEAS=512, R_repeats=5, seed_master=0x6121A0003, AMP=0.25, freq_palette=[220,330,440,550,660], EPS_XFADE=1e-6, S_CLICK=0.05, DLL v1.0.3159
gate_fidelity_fixes_applied: R1: events_delivered_A_prepare compared with strict '==' to events scheduled in [K_PREPARE_START,K_PREPARE_DONE] (was parent '>=')
R1: events_delivered_A_prepare now measures the WINDOWED delivered count (was parent whole-run total; required for the '==' to be meaningful per §5)
R3: click_max<=S_CLICK moved INSIDE R3_pass (was omitted by parent)
R3: maxerr_reload_A / maxerr_B_xfade / maxerr_reload_B compared with literal '==0' per §5 (tightened from parent '<=1e-6'; strengthening, never a relaxation)
certification_note: MEASURE phase re-check (fresh clean rebuild): both variants' NORMAL /O2 exe AND ASan exe ran directly to completion (normal exe was NOT Device-Guard-blocked this run; exit code 1 = FINAL FAIL verdict, not a crash). Run order per run.bat: ASan exe -> asan_run.log, then normal exe ingests it and writes the certifying metrics.json. ASan sanitizer reports: 0 (ASAN_RUN_CLEAN_EXIT) for both variants; no AddressSanitizer/heap/use-after/leak lines. All R1-R4 numbers bit-identical between the normal and ASan builds and between this fresh rebuild and the implement phase.

A.definition: PRE-REG §3 Variant A — drop reset() in xfade init at k==K_XFADE_START; use fresh worker-created B directly; oracle unchanged.

B.definition: PRE-REG §3 Variant B — keep live reset() in xfade init; add reset() to renderRefBxfade before the initial latch (align oracle to implementation).

falsification_evidence.interpretation: reset() is a phase no-op on a freshly-created, never-advanced Cmajor performer: toggling reset() on either the oracle (Variant B) or the live path (Variant A) leaves output byte-identical. The maxerr_B_xfade=0.4996 (~2*AMP, anti-phase) divergence is therefore NOT caused by reset()-vs-fresh. Both pre-registered variants are inert w.r.t. the actual root cause and both FAIL R3 identically (bit-for-bit the parent value).

verdict_rule: PRE-REG §6: FINAL PASS iff (Variant A PASS) OR (Variant B PASS). Both FAIL.
